MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF MARGUERITE STONE Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint- DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE MOTION SERVED BY MAIL ON JANUARY 4, 2006, ONLY 16 COURT DAYS AND 3 CALENDAR DAYS.
